entity.summary: Global digital-asset and multi-currency platform providing crypto purchases, instant exchange, wallet, banking-link, payment, and card services for personal and business users.
entity.notes: The current first-party platform supports account registration, crypto investment, instant currency exchange, wallets, markets, bank links, and international payments. Launch date remains null because this review focused on current identity and did not recover a sufficiently precise first-party launch marker.

evidence.title: Currency.com official platform
evidence.notes: First-party platform exposes current account registration, crypto purchases, instant exchange, wallet, bank-link, payment, card, and market services across multiple jurisdictions.

evidence.title: Currency.com legal information
evidence.notes: First-party legal surface documents the current service framework and operating entities, including the United States money-services-business registration disclosed by the platform.
